slice: Adds an optional sign-in flow to the Welcome screen so a session can adopt a real, persistent Repository identity (starting with the base "Vihu Planet" builder account created via supabase/create_base_builder_user.sql) instead of a disposable per-browser anonymous one. New #wb-identity-bar shows anonymous/signed-in/not-configured states; a Sign In modal (email+password, reusing the existing standalone modal shell and field CSS) calls the new ThemeRepositoryClient.signIn()/signOut()/getIdentity(). Signing in replaces the active session -- content owned by the prior anonymous identity becomes invisible, a disclosed RLS consequence, not a bug. A real boot-wiring bug was caught and fixed: boot never called showWelcome(), only renderMyWorlds() directly, so the identity bar rendered blank until wired into that same boot call. Verified via a stateful mock Repository client covering anonymous/wrong-password/correct-password/sign-out. goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged.
